subject: chore(release): allow prerelease (algolia/vue-instantsearch#538)
body:
* chore(release): allow prerelease

flow didn't change, except that now you can give a prerelease-style version and it will release on the right npm tag

* chore: process.stdout.write

* chore: finish rename

* feat: allow release from non-master branch
